title: Remove GraphNode model and related control-plane cruft

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting GraphNode removal implementation on a fresh feature branch from develop. Scope: remove GraphNode schema/UI/MCP/runtime/metrics surfaces while keeping schema index changes to one index per surviving table.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Investigating staging Amplify job 118 failure: backend synth/typecheck passed, but CDK asset publish failed for ConsoleRunWorkerStack Template (current_account-current_region) before CloudFormation update. Fixing stack env resolution so staging can reach schema deployment validation.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Patched dashboard/amplify/backend.ts to force explicit env on ConsoleRunWorkerStack (account/region from CDK_DEFAULT_* with AWS_* fallback) and fail fast if unresolved, so CDK does not synthesize current_account-current_region during staging deploy.
